name: Basic Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all the ingredients together.
2. Shape mixture by tablespoonfuls into 1 1/2-inch balls. (For ease in shaping the meatball, occasionally wet your hands with cold water.)
3. To cook in a skillet: Heat 1 tbsp salad oil in a large skillet. Cook the meatballs over medium heat until brown, about 20 minutes. Drain off excess fat.
4. To cook in the oven: Place the meatballs in a lightly greased baking pan (13 x 9 x 2 or 15 1/2 x 9 1/2 x 1-inch). Bake, uncovered, at 400 degrees F until light brown, about 20 minutes. Drain off excess fat.
